Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.MetricTransformation2D

  • Packages that use MetricTransformation2D 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures
    com.irurueta.geometry.refiners  

    • Uses of MetricTransformation2D in com.irurueta.geometry

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that return MetricTransformation2D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2D.combineAndReturnNew​(EuclideanTransformation2D transformation)
      Combines this transformation with provided transformation and returns the result as a new transformation instance.
      MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2D.combineAndReturnNew​(MetricTransformation2D transformation)
      Combines this transformation with provided transformation and returns the result as a new transformation instance.
      MetricTransformation2D EuclideanTransformation2D.toMetric()
      Converts this transformation into a metric transformation.
      MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2D.toMetric()
      Converts this transformation into a metric transformation.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry with parameters of type MetricTransformation2D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void MetricTransformation2D.combine​(MetricTransformation2D transformation)
      Combines this transformation with provided transformation.
      private void MetricTransformation2D.combine​(MetricTransformation2D inputTransformation, MetricTransformation2D outputTransformation)
      Combines this transformation with provided input transformation and stores the result into provided output transformation.
      MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2D.combineAndReturnNew​(MetricTransformation2D transformation)
      Combines this transformation with provided transformation and returns the result as a new transformation instance.
      protected void MetricTransformation2D.inverse​(MetricTransformation2D result)
      Computes the inverse of this transformation and stores the result in provided instance.

    • Uses of MetricTransformation2D in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return MetricTransformation2D 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.attemptRefine​(MetricTransformation2D transformation)
      Attempts to refine provided solution if refinement is requested.
      MetricTransformation2D LMedSMetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformaiton using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2DEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using the list of matched input and output 2D points.
      abstract MetricTransformation2D MetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.

      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation2D PROMedSMetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation2D PROSACMetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.
      MetricTransformation2D RANSACMetricTransformation2DRobustEstimator.estimate()
      Estimates a metric 2D transformation using a robust estimator and the best set of matched 2D point correspondences found using the robust estimator.

      Attempts to refine provided solution if refinement is requested.

      Refines provided initial estimation.
      private double MetricTransformation2DRefiner.residual​(MetricTransformation2D transformation, Point2D inputPoint, Point2D outputPoint)
      Computes the residual between the euclidean transformation and a pair or matched points.

      Computes total residual among all provided inlier samples.
